hero.title: Find your inner
hero.subtitle: A conscious companionship for your inner transformation through meditation, reflection, silent retreats, and personal growth.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: A journey of presence, deep listening, and inner transformation.
about.paragraph1: My interest in self-knowledge, awareness, and inner transformation comes from the direct experience of observing life, its changes, and the challenges we all face.
about.paragraph2: I accompany people who wish to understand themselves more deeply, develop a more conscious relationship with themselves, and find ways to inhabit their emotions, their processes, and their own story from a broader, more compassionate perspective.
about.paragraph3: I believe in the importance of presence, deep listening, and genuine connection as tools for well-being and personal growth.
about.presenceDesc: Cultivating the ability to be here and now with openness and attention.
about.listenDesc: Creating safe spaces where every experience can be witnessed and understood.
about.transformationDesc: Recognizing patterns, developing awareness, and opening new possibilities for growth.

services.subtitle: Companionship for your inner journey
services.courseDesc: Structured programs to learn meditation and deepen your practice.
services.retreatDesc: Immersive experiences in nature to disconnect and reconnect.

reprogramming.title: Pattern Release
reprogramming.subtitle: Rewriting the Inner Story
reprogramming.desc: A guided process to identify and transform beliefs and patterns that no longer serve you, creating new neural pathways toward well-being.
reprogramming.step1Desc: Make visible the patterns that repeat in how you think, feel, relate, and make decisions.
reprogramming.step2Desc: Recognize where certain beliefs, inner stories, and ways of responding to life come from.
reprogramming.step3Desc: Open the possibility of building a freer, more conscious, and compassionate relationship with yourself.
reprogramming.step4Desc: Bring that new understanding into daily life through small conscious decisions.
reprogramming.intro:
Much of what we experience isn't truly a conscious choice, but the repetition of stories we learned to live as if they were truth.

Beliefs about who you are.

About how you should behave.

About what you can or cannot receive.

About how life is supposed to be.

Over time, these ideas solidify into patterns.

And patterns become identity.
reprogramming.description:
This process is a space of conscious dialogue where we explore your personal history to observe the patterns that repeat in your emotional, mental, and relational life.

Through conversation and writing, what normally operates automatically becomes visible.

It's not about fixing you or turning you into someone different.

It's about looking clearly at the stories you've learned to inhabit to reclaim the possibility of choosing from a more conscious place.
reprogramming.note: This is an educational and personal growth companionship service. It does not substitute psychological therapy or professional medical attention. If you're going through a moment of intense emotional crisis, we recommend seeking specialized professional support.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: A space to share reflections, meditations, and tools that accompany your journey of self-knowledge, presence, and transformation.
resources.featuredText1: Life seems long when we think about it, but brief when we observe it with attention.
resources.featuredText2: So often we live as if there were always more time: more time to be grateful, to listen, to say what we feel, or to fully inhabit the present moment.
resources.featuredText3: Remembering that our experience is finite doesn't have to create fear. It can become an invitation to live with greater awareness, presence, and depth.
resources.featuredText4: Perhaps the question isn't how much time we have, but how we choose to inhabit the time we've been given.
resources.reflexionesDesc: Thoughts and writings on life, presence, change, silence, and the process of inner transformation.
resources.meditacionesDesc: Practices to support you through moments of anxiety, emotional regulation, rest, and reconnection with yourself.
resources.podcastDesc: Audio reflections on life's brevity, death, presence, silence, and the awakening of consciousness.
resources.reflectionsNote: New reflections written by Fabrizio will be added soon.
resources.podcastNote: You'll soon be able to listen to the first podcast episodes here.

bookings.actividadesDesc: Check upcoming dates for workshops, gatherings, meditations, or group activities.
